scope: Operation input contracts only. Operation context is validated separately by the runtime operationContextSchema at CLI/MCP adapter boundaries.
validationContract: An input is valid only when both `input` JSON Schema and `runtimeRefinements` pass.

inventory-included-no-reason.mechanism: if included then reason must be absent

inventory-change-hash.mechanism: if non-deleted changeKind then required contentHash

inventory-deleted-reason.mechanism: if deleted then exact incremental_deleted exclusion

inventory-unchanged-reason.mechanism: if unchanged then incremental_unchanged or mode-priority non_regular_file exclusion

negatives.case: included inventory row rejects exclusion reason
modified inventory row requires target contentHash
deleted inventory row requires exact reason
unchanged inventory row requires exact reason

fixtures.negativeCase: commit must be forty lowercase hex characters

negatives.case: commit must be forty lowercase hex characters

runtimeRefinements.message: scope completion payload must not exceed 1 MiB
scope completion may contain at most 200 evidence entries

fixtures.negativeCase: unresolved disposition cannot claim feature placement

negatives.case: unresolved disposition cannot claim feature placement

fixtures.negativeCase: nested file array rejects trailing whitespace

negatives.case: nested file array rejects trailing whitespace
nested evidence sourceRef rejects whitespace only
nested anchor contentHash rejects trailing whitespace
nested long string measures Unicode characters consistently
top-level id measures raw padded length
top-level id measures Unicode characters consistently
